pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Swagger/OpenAPI documentation support.
Add H2 in-memory database for development and testing purposes.
Add spring-boot-starter-data-redis for Redis Pub/Sub and session management.
Add spring-boot-starter-actuator for application metrics and monitoring endpoints.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to measure and report code coverage.
Add Maven Failsafe plugin to run integration tests.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin to scan for vulnerable dependencies.
Add SpotBugs plugin for static code analysis to detect potential bugs.
Add integration-tests profile to configure Spring Boot start/stop during integration test phase.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure embedded H2 database connection properties to ensure the application runs without external MySQL.
Set JPA properties for H2 dialect and schema generation to support the embedded database.
Enable the H2 web console for database inspection during development.
Configure Redis connection details for distributed Pub/Sub functionality.
Configure Spring to initialize data from SQL scripts on startup.
Set logging levels for Hibernate SQL and specific application components.
Explicitly define the server port for the application.
Configure SpringDoc OpenAPI paths and sorting options for API documentation.
Expose all Actuator endpoints and configure health details for monitoring.
Provide application metadata for Actuator info endpoint.
